summary.zhHant: Ground Beef Pesto Pasta is a practical two-person Italian / European / Western dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.
summary.yue: Ground Beef Pesto Pasta is a practical two-person Italian / European / Western dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.

nutritionAssumptions.reason: Included as a practical cooking-fat estimate for the two-person method.
Included as a light seasoning estimate; users can reduce salt to taste.

detail.zhHant: Set out Ground beef, Pasta, Eggplant, Canned tomatoes, Parmesan, bring salted water to a boil, and cut vegetables small enough to mix through the noodles without heavy bites.
detail.yue: Set out Ground beef, Pasta, Eggplant, Canned tomatoes, Parmesan, bring salted water to a boil, and cut vegetables small enough to mix through the noodles without heavy bites.
detail.en: Set out Ground beef, Pasta, Eggplant, Canned tomatoes, Parmesan, bring salted water to a boil, and cut vegetables small enough to mix through the noodles without heavy bites.

detail.zhHant: Cook the pasta or noodles until just tender, saving a small cup of cooking water before draining so the final sauce can loosen smoothly.
detail.yue: Cook the pasta or noodles until just tender, saving a small cup of cooking water before draining so the final sauce can loosen smoothly.
detail.en: Cook the pasta or noodles until just tender, saving a small cup of cooking water before draining so the final sauce can loosen smoothly.

detail.zhHant: Cook Ground beef with onion, garlic, vegetables, and seasoning base until fragrant, then fold in the noodles and a splash of saved water.
detail.yue: Cook Ground beef with onion, garlic, vegetables, and seasoning base until fragrant, then fold in the noodles and a splash of saved water.
detail.en: Cook Ground beef with onion, garlic, vegetables, and seasoning base until fragrant, then fold in the noodles and a splash of saved water.

detail.zhHant: Turn off the heat when the sauce clings lightly, divide Ground Beef Pesto Pasta between two plates, and finish with cheese, herbs, or lime if they fit the dish.
detail.yue: Turn off the heat when the sauce clings lightly, divide Ground Beef Pesto Pasta between two plates, and finish with cheese, herbs, or lime if they fit the dish.
detail.en: Turn off the heat when the sauce clings lightly, divide Ground Beef Pesto Pasta between two plates, and finish with cheese, herbs, or lime if they fit the dish.
